<!--- Please update the title of this issue with the mod name -->

**Is your mod request related to an optimisation problem? If so, please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I've noticed the modpack runs poorly when [...]

**Is your mod request related to a QOL request? If so, please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I would like to see [...]

**Suggested Mod**
A clear and concise description of the mod, including its Modrinth link.

**Describe alternatives to this mod**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or mods which provide a similar feature/fix.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
